info.title: GMCA
info.author: thcolin
info.details:
GMCA (Gamepad Media Center Aggregator) is one native, controller-first client for the media servers you already run — Plex, Jellyfin, Emby and Stremio — on the screens the big apps forget.

Point it at a server and browse, search and play with the gamepad alone. The interface never changes between backends; only the accent colour and the tabs follow your server.

• Plex — plex.tv sign-in, Home profiles, Watchlist, hubs, universal transcode
• Jellyfin / Emby — URL + Quick Connect (no keyboard) or user & password; resume, Next Up, favourites
• Stremio — one login syncs your add-on catalogues and library, debrid included
• Offline downloads, subtitles and a built-in mpv player

Independent third-party project. Not affiliated with Plex, Jellyfin, Emby or Stremio.

changelog: First release on the Homebrew App Store (v1.0.5).\n\nGMCA is the multi-backend evolution of pleNx: alongside Plex it now speaks Jellyfin, Emby and Stremio through one shared, gamepad-first interface. Recent fixes harden Stremio artwork and playback on low-memory devices and clean up the Now Playing queue. Existing pleNx installs migrate their data automatically on first launch.
